name: arifos-mcp
description: arifOS Constitutional AI Governance MCP Server - profile-aware APEX-G hub with VAULT999 ledger

deployment.transport_note: SSE removed: deprecated by MCP spec (2025-03) and Microsoft Copilot Studio (2025-08). Use streamable-http for all remote clients.

profiles.full: All tools + phase2 external capability tools. Default for VPS/local use.
profiles.copilot: Copilot Studio-safe surface: 6 flat-schema tools, no legacy aliases, no phase2 tools. Set ARIFOS_PUBLIC_TOOL_PROFILE=copilot.
profiles.chatgpt: ChatGPT/OpenAI compatible surface. No phase2 tools.
profiles.agnostic_public: Minimal public surface. No phase2 tools.

tools.description: 6-tool Copilot Studio-safe core stack (profile=copilot). Full profile adds legacy orchestration tools.

authentication.note: Set COPILOT_API_KEY env var to enable. Leave empty for open access (development). In Copilot Studio wizard: Authentication -> API Key -> Header -> X-API-Key.
